transcript: Just examination shows RAS in the basis which is a little unusual and diffuse bronchi on both lung fields. We asked for a lung function test which shows so and so, so and so, so and so. He also asked for a pheno which is showing an elevated fraction. Overall diagnosis is uncontrolled asthma. At this point he would be treated.

transcript_english: Physical examination revealed RAS in the bases, which is somewhat unusual, along with diffuse bronchial findings in both lung fields. A lung function test was requested, revealing multiple abnormalities. A FeNO test was also requested, which showed an elevated fraction. The overall diagnosis is uncontrolled asthma. Treatment will be initiated at this point.
